meta.title: MatchWorky — AI interviews for recruiting teams
meta.description: Automate candidate screening with conversational interviews. Define questions, share the link, and analyze answers in one platform.
meta.ogDescription: Automate early-stage screening and improve the candidate experience with intelligent conversational interviews.

hero.description: MatchWorky runs automated conversational interviews on behalf of your company. Define your questions, share the link with candidates, and analyze responses in one place.

preview.label: Automated interview
preview.bot1: Hi! I am Acme's recruiting assistant. Shall we start with a few questions?
preview.bot2: Great! Tell me a bit about your experience with React and TypeScript.

features.title: Everything you need to hire better
features.description: A complete platform from job creation to response analysis. No external tools. No complexity.

items.title: Conversational interviews
items.desc: Candidates answer in a simple chat interface — no confusing forms, no PDFs, no friction.

items.title: Automatic verification
items.desc: Email and phone verified with OTP codes — ensuring each candidate is unique and authentic.

items.title: Candidate dashboard
items.desc: View all responses in a clean interface. Filter, search, and export in one click.

items.title: Custom questionnaires
items.desc: Create role-specific questions. Add, reorder, and remove items effortlessly.

items.title: AI analysis
items.desc: Automatic answer analysis with scoring and AI-generated summaries for every candidate.

items.title: Report exports
items.desc: Export applications as PDF or CSV to share with your team or integrate with other systems.

howItWorks.title: From job post to hire in 3 steps
howItWorks.description: The process is designed to be simple for your team and smooth for candidates.

steps.title: Create your role
steps.desc: Define title, description, and questions for candidates. You can run multiple active roles at the same time.

steps.title: Share the link
steps.desc: Each role has a unique URL. Share it on social media, your website, or by email — candidates can join without creating an account.

steps.title: Analyze responses
steps.desc: All applications are centralized in your dashboard. AI generates summaries and scoring so you can focus on top candidates.

items.quote: We used to spend weeks reviewing CVs. With MatchWorky, in two days we already had the top 5 candidates ready for in-person interviews.
items.author: Ana Rodrigues

items.quote: The candidate experience is amazing. Zero frustration, zero huge forms. People love answering this way.
items.author: Miguel Santos

items.quote: The AI summary saves us at least 2 hours per candidate. For us, it has been a game changer in technical hiring.
items.author: Sofia Mendes

pricing.title: Choose the best plan for your team
pricing.description: Start with a base plan and scale without complex migrations. Cancel anytime.
pricing.trial: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

basic.description: For small teams that want faster early screening.

pro.description: Scale with more volume and more operational control.

enterprise.description: For teams with advanced security and scale requirements.

cta.title: Ready to hire faster?
cta.description: Join teams that already automated candidate screening. Set up your first role in under 5 minutes.
cta.footnote: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

footer.description: SaaS platform for AI-powered conversational interviews. Automate early screening and improve the candidate experience.
